NCT04373564.title: Effect on Body Movement and Mental Skills in Patients Who Received Gadolinium-based Contrast Media for Magnetic Resonance Examination Multiple Times Within 5 Years

notes: The chart title and bars fit a phase distribution, but the answer is not faithful to the full question: it omits the requested recruiting and industry-sponsored filters in the visible framing, and it includes a Phase NA bucket plus phases from studies not clearly pancreatic cancer-specific. The query is specifically about recruiting, industry-sponsored interventional pancreatic cancer trials started in 2020 or later.
